summary.description:
Today, cooler for the feels like temperature (down 2.5°C) and outside temperature (down 2.4°C) and more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 11%).

The past week and month had observable variation in the amount of wind (up 21 miles), cloud levels (up 167 m), outside temperature (up 2.2°C), and dew point temperature (up 1.5°C) when compared to today.

summary.summary: Inside; temperatures should be quite comfortable. Outside; moderate and mild. Also, air will feel comfortable and balanced and light winds will prevail. A few light raindrops may fall, fog or low cloud is expected, and it’s dark. Weather could become unsettled.
